untranslatable_reason: Beta calculation is not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires identifying and ranking stocks by beta (volatility relative to market), constructing a low-beta portfolio, and applying leverage—none of which can be expressed using only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, Z-scores, or bar properties. Beta requires multi-stock comparative analysis and is a portfolio-level metric, not a single-instrument indicator.
translation_notes: This is a regime/factor-allocation signal (beta factor investing) rather than a technical signal. It requires: (1) cross-sectional stock screening by beta coefficient, (2) portfolio construction logic, and (3) leverage application—all beyond the scope of single-instrument technical analysis. The backtest engine would need beta data and multi-leg position management to implement this strategy.
